text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>In denen Thurneysischen Buchläden allhier, seynd dato folgende zwey Bücher zu haben, so in Nancy durch Subscriptiones gedruckt worden. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionnaire Universel- Francois & Latin, Vulgairement appellé Dictionaire de Trevoux</TITLE>, avec des Remarques d'Erudition & de Critique <VOLUME>5. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>; davon die 3. ersten Tom. dato schon zu beziehen sind; das gantze Werck kostet samt der Fracht <PRIZE>fl. 24</PRIZE></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Oeconomique, continant les moyens d'Augmenter son bien & de conserver sa sante</TITLE>, par <AUTHOR>Mister Noel Chomel</AUTHOR>, Augmente dun Nouveau Supplement de deur Volumes, par <AUTHOR>F. Marset, Doct. en Medecine</AUTHOR> .<FORMAT>avec fig. fol.</FORMAT> <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>; davon der erste Tomus dato bey ihnen zu beziehen ist; das gantze Werck kostet samt der Fracht <PRIZE>fl. 18</PRIZE></BIBL>. So dann sind bey ihnen auch genugsam annoch zu haben: <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Historique & Critique de Mr. Bayle</TITLE>- <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <PLACE>Amsterd.</PLACE> <YEAR>1740</YEAR>. † <PRIZE>L. 27</PRIZE></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Corpus Juris Civilis Romani, cum Notis Gothofred</TITLE> <VOLUME>2. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1740</YEAR>. † <PRIZE>fl. 10. 48. xr.</PRIZE></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Royal, Francois-Allemand-Latin, par le R. P. Fr. Pomey</TITLE> <VOLUME>3. Voll.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>. † <PRIZE>fl. 5. 24. xr.</PRIZE></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":5,"explanation":"Corrected XML structure and content integrity. Key fixes include: 1) Standardized price tags from 'PRICE' to 'PRIZE' for consistency across all bibliography entries. 2) Fixed mismatched closing tags (</PRICE> to </PRIZE>). 3) Merged duplicate <FORMAT> tags in the second entry into a single coherent tag. 4) Normalized character encoding artifacts (e.g., '√§' to 'ä', '√†' to '†', '√≤' to 'to') to restore historical accuracy. 5) Corrected obvious transcription errors (e.g., '2vec' to 'avec', 'dien' to 'bien', 'Gotofrest' to 'Gothofred')."}

parsed.explanation: Corrected XML structure and content integrity. Key fixes include: 1) Standardized price tags from 'PRICE' to 'PRIZE' for consistency across all bibliography entries. 2) Fixed mismatched closing tags (</PRICE> to </PRIZE>). 3) Merged duplicate <FORMAT> tags in the second entry into a single coherent tag. 4) Normalized character encoding artifacts (e.g., '√§' to 'ä', '√†' to '†', '√≤' to 'to') to restore historical accuracy. 5) Corrected obvious transcription errors (e.g., '2vec' to 'avec', 'dien' to 'bien', 'Gotofrest' to 'Gothofred').
